name: Intune Profile Converter
description: Intune Profile Converter is a native macOS app that transforms Apple .mobileconfig profiles into Microsoft Intune-compatible formats. It supports Settings Catalog JSON and Preference File XML, automatically strips CMS/PKCS#7 signatures, and can batch process multiple profiles. It also handles MCX managed preferences, provides a session log with per-file results, and includes a built-in Settings Catalog reference browser with auto-updates via Sparkle.
author: Gil Burns

securityCheck.aiSummary: Code appears safe for an Intune management tool. The only notable concern is the in-memory extraction of the Graph bearer token for subsequent API calls. This is a known technique but could present token exposure risk if logs or memory are inspected. Recommend relying on the Graph SDK authentication flow without manual token extraction, and ensure token handling does not log or persist sensitive information. Otherwise, no obfuscated code, no remote script execution, no exfiltration to external endpoints, and no hardcoded secrets.
